memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: UGC

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: UGC

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FAccelByteModelsUGCRequest const &UGCRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateContent

briefdescription.para: Create a content with FString preview and get the payload url to upload the content.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
Detail information for the content request.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &Name, FString const &Type, FString const &SubType, TArray< FString > const &Tags, TArray< uint8 > const &Preview, FString const &FileExtension, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &ContentType=TEXT("application/octet-stream"))
memberdef.name: CreateContent

briefdescription.para: Create a content with TArray<uint8> Preview parameter and get the payload url to upload the content.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
Name of the content.
Type of the content.
SubType of the content.
Tags of the content.
The TArray<uint8> of the content's Preview
FileExtension of the content.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The specific type of the content's created, default value is "application/octet-stream".

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &ContentId, FAccelByteModelsUGCUpdateRequest const &ModifyRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ModifyContent

briefdescription.para: Modify existing content to update some information with FString preview.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
The id of the content that will be modified.
Detail information for the content request that will be modified.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &ContentId, FAccelByteModelsUGCRequest const &UGCRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bUpdateContent=false)
memberdef.name: ModifyContent

briefdescription.para: Modify existing content to update some information with FString preview.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
The id of the content that will be modified.
Detail information for the content request that will be modified.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will be used to update the content too or only content information . Default value is false.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use void ModifyContent(FString const& ChannelId , FString const& ContentId , FAccelByteModelsUGCUpdateRequest const& ModifyRequest , THandler<FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse> const& OnSuccess , FErrorHandler const& OnError);

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &ContentId, FString const &Name, FString const &Type, FString const &SubType, TArray< FString > const &Tags, TArray< uint8 > const &Preview, FString const &FileExtension, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &ContentType=TEXT("application/octet-stream"), bool bUpdateContent=false)
memberdef.name: ModifyContent

briefdescription.para: Modify existing content to update some information with TArray<uint8> Preview parameter.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
The id of the content that will be modified.
Name of the content.
Type of the content.
SubType of the content.
Tags of the content.
The TArray<uint8> of the content's Preview
FileExtension of the content.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The specific type of the content's modified. Default value is "application/octet-stream".
This will be used to update the content too or only content information . Default value is false.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use void ModifyContent(FString const& ChannelId , FString const& ContentId , FAccelByteModelsUGCUpdateRequest const& ModifyRequest , THandler<FAccelByteModelsUGCResponse> const& OnSuccess , FErrorHandler const& OnError);

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &ContentId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteContent

briefdescription.para: Delete a content based on the its channel id and content id.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
The id of the content that will be deleted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCContentResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Get a content information by its content id.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content that will be fetched.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCContentResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: PublicGetContentByContentId

briefdescription.para: Get a content information by its content id. Can be used without logged in.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content that will be fetched.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: The share code of the content that will be fetched.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Get a content information by its share code. Can be used without logged in.

parameterdescription.para: The share code of the content that will be fetched.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.name: GetContentPreview

briefdescription.para: Get content Preview as FAccelByteModelsUGCPreview.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the Preview's content that will be fetched.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCPreview.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, THandler< TArray< uint8 > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetContentPreview

briefdescription.para: Get content preview as TArray<uint8>.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the Preview's content that will be fetched.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<uint8>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCTagsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=1000, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetTags

briefdescription.para: Get all tags.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCTagsPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The limit of the tags results. Default value is 1000.
The offset of the tags results. Default value is 0.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCTypesPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=1000, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetTypes

briefdescription.para: Get all types and subtypes.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCTypesPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The limit of the types and subtypes results. Default value is 1000.
The offset of the types and subtypes results. Default value is 0.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: CreateChannel

briefdescription.para: Create a player's channel with specific channel name.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the channel.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCChannelResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &ChannelName, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCChannelResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateChannel

briefdescription.para: Update a player's channel with specific channel name.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the channel that will be updated.
The name of the channel.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCChannelResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GetChannels

briefdescription.para: Get all of the player's channels.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCChannelsPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The limit of the channel results. Default value is 1000.
The offset of the channel results. Default value is 0.
The name of the channel you want to query.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCChannelsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=1000, int32 Offset=0, FString const &ChannelName="")
memberdef.name: GetChannels

briefdescription.para: Get all of the player's channels.

parameterdescription.para: User Id
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCChannelsPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The limit of the channel results. Default value is 1000.
The offset of the channel results. Default value is 0.
The name of the channel you want to query.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Name, FString const &Creator, FString const &Type, FString const &Subtype, TArray< FString > const &Tags, bool IsOfficial, FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteUgcSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteUgcSortBy::DATE, EAccelByteUgcOrderBy OrderBy=EAccelByteUgcOrderBy::DESC, int32 Limit=1000, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: SearchContents

briefdescription.para: Search specific contents based on the given filter.

parameterdescription.para: Content Name.
Creator Name.
Content Type.
Content Subtype.
Content Tags.
Filter only official contents
User Id
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Sorting criteria, name,download,like,date. default=date.
Sorting order: asc, desc. default=desc
Number of content per page. Default value : 1000
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsRequest const &Request, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: SearchContents

briefdescription.para: Search specific contents based on the given filter.

parameterdescription.para: Filter request to specify the search result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 20
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Name, FString const &Creator, FString const &Type, FString const &Subtype, TArray< FString > const &Tags, bool IsOfficial, FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteUgcSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteUgcSortBy::DATE, EAccelByteUgcOrderBy OrderBy=EAccelByteUgcOrderBy::DESC, int32 Limit=1000, int32 Offset=0)

briefdescription.para: Search specific contents based on the given filter. Can be used without logged in.

parameterdescription.para: Content Name.
Creator Name.
Content Type.
Content Subtype.
Content Tags.
Filter only official contents
User Id
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Sorting criteria, name,download,like,date. default=date.
Sorting order: asc, desc. default=desc
Number of content per page. Default value : 1000
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Search contents specific to a channel.

parameterdescription.para: Channel Id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 20
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: created time with asc or desc. default = created time and desc.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteUGCContentUtilitiesSortByV2 SortBy=EAccelByteUGCContentUtilitiesSortByV2::CREATED_TIME_DESC)
memberdef.name: PublicSearchContentsSpecificToChannelV2

briefdescription.para: Search contents specific to a channel. Can be used without logged in.

parameterdescription.para: Channel Id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 20
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: created time with asc or desc. default = created time and desc.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsUGCFilterRequestV2 const &Filter, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteUGCContentSortByV2 SortBy=EAccelByteUGCContentSortByV2::CREATED_TIME_DESC)
memberdef.name: SearchContentsV2

briefdescription.para: Get all contents in current namespace.

parameterdescription.para: To filter the returned UGC contets.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 20
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: name, download, like, created time with asc or desc. default = created time and desc.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsUGCFilterRequestV2 const &Filter, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteUGCContentSortByV2 SortBy=EAccelByteUGCContentSortByV2::CREATED_TIME_DESC)
memberdef.name: PublicSearchContentsV2

briefdescription.para: Get all contents in current namespace. Can be used without logged in.

parameterdescription.para: To filter the returned UGC contets.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCSearchContentsPagingResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 20
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: name, download, like, created time with asc or desc. default = created time and desc.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: CreateContentV2

briefdescription.para: Create a UGC content with create content request.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
Detail information for the content request.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCCreateUGCResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelId, FString const &ContentId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteContentV2

briefdescription.para: Delete a content based on the its channel id and content id.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
The id of the content that will be deleted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: ModifyContentV2

briefdescription.para: Modify existing content to update content metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content's channel.
The id of the content.
Detail information for the content request that will be modified.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCModifyUGCResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.name: UpdateContentScreenshotV2

briefdescription.para: Update screenshots for content.

parameterdescription.para: Content Id.
Screenshots Request Supported file extensions: pjp, jpg, jpeg, jfif, bmp, png. Maximum description length: 1024.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCUpdateScreenshotsV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Upload screenshots for content.

parameterdescription.para: Content Id.
Screenshots Request. Supported file extensions: pjp, jpg, jpeg, jfif, bmp, png. Maximum description length: 1024.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCUpdateContentScreenshotResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCGetPaginatedContentDownloaderResponseV2 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &UserId=TEXT(""), int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteUGCContentUtilitiesSortByV2 SortBy=EAccelByteUGCContentUtilitiesSortByV2::CREATED_TIME_DESC)
memberdef.name: GetListContentDownloaderV2

briefdescription.para: Get list of UGC content downloader.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCGetPaginatedContentDownloaderResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The id of the user who downloaded the content.
Number of content per page. Default value : 1000
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: created time with asc or desc. default = created time and desc.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCGetPaginatedContentLikerResponseV2 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteUGCContentUtilitiesSortByV2 SortBy=EAccelByteUGCContentUtilitiesSortByV2::CREATED_TIME_DESC)
memberdef.name: GetListContentLikerV2

briefdescription.para: Get a list of users who like the content.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the content.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUGCGetPaginatedContentLikerResponseV2.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 1000
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: created time with asc or desc. default = created time and desc.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Update like/unlike status to a content.

parameterdescription.para: The content id that will be updated.
New like Status value.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EStagingContentRequestStatus Status, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCPaginatedListStagingContentResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteStagingContentUtilitiesSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStagingContentUtilitiesSortBy::NONE)
memberdef.name: GetStagingContents

briefdescription.para: Get a list of staging contents and sort by status.

parameterdescription.para: Sort the response item by status of the staging list contents
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsPaginatedListStagingContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Number of content per page. Default value : 20
The offset number to retrieve. Default value : 0
Sorting criteria: created time with asc or desc and updated time with asc or desc. default = none.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUGCStagingContentResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

parameterdescription.para: Target content id to retrieved
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsStagingContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: UpdateStagingContent

briefdescription.para: Update staging content by content id using update request struct.

parameterdescription.para: Target content id to update the content
Query or params in struct to request an update
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsStagingContentResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ContentId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteStagingContent

parameterdescription.para: Target content id to update the content
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.
